utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package contains: (1) destination specified as 'Prague, Czech Republic'; (2) travel_dates specified as 'August 10–14, 2024'; (3) transportation fully detailed including flights and airport transfer with costs and statuses; (4) accommodation fully specified with hotel name, room type, dates, cost, and status; (5) activities listed with names, dates, costs, and statuses; (6) additional_services included with airport_taxi and cost value; (7) total_budget provided with total_cost and remaining_budget breakdown. All 7 items are present and fully specified with the required details.
